products.name: Dilmah Ceylon Tea Premium - 25 Tea Bags (50g)
products.description: Classic single-origin Ceylon black tea in convenient tea bags. Bright, full-bodied and refreshing - Sri Lanka's most iconic everyday brew, best enjoyed with or without milk.

products.name: Mlesna English Breakfast Tea Bags (50g)
products.description: A robust blend of high-grown Ceylon teas from Mlesna, crafted for a rich, malty cup that pairs perfectly with a hearty breakfast.

products.name: Ahmad Ceylon Tea Premium Blend - Loose Leaf (200g)
products.description: A selection of premium teas from the best gardens of Sri Lanka. Smooth, aromatic loose-leaf black tea for a traditional pot of Ceylon tea.

products.name: Jaf Tea Ceylon Supreme - Loose Leaf (250g Pouch)
products.description: Premium high-grown Ceylon loose-leaf black tea with a bright liquor and lingering flavour. A supreme-grade single-origin tea in a resealable pouch.

products.name: Dilmah Premium Ceylon Tea BOPF - Loose Black Tea (400g)
products.description: Broken Orange Pekoe Fannings loose black tea - a strong, brisk and full-bodied brew ideal for a proper morning cup with milk.

products.name: Ceylon Cinnamon Sticks - Grade Alba (250g)
products.description: Authentic Ceylon 'true cinnamon' quills, prized worldwide for their delicate aroma, low coumarin content and naturally sweet taste. Packed in an eco-friendly kraft bag.

products.name: Ceylon Cardamom - Whole Green Pods (100g)
products.description: Fragrant Sri Lankan green cardamom pods with an intense, sweet-spicy aroma. A staple of Ceylon curries, milk teas and desserts.

products.name: Ceylon Black Pepper - Whole Peppercorns (250g)
products.description: Bold, pungent whole black peppercorns grown in the hill country of Sri Lanka. High piperine content for a sharp, earthy heat.

products.name: Ceylon Cloves - Whole (100g)
products.description: Premium sun-dried Sri Lankan cloves with a warm, sweet and intensely aromatic flavour. Perfect for curries, rice dishes and spiced tea.

products.name: Pure Ceylon Vanilla Extract - MeCeylon (80ml)
products.description: Rich, natural vanilla extract made from Sri Lankan-grown vanilla beans. Adds deep, floral sweetness to baking and desserts.

products.name: Gurulu Raksha Traditional Wooden Mask - Ambalangoda
products.description: Hand-carved and hand-painted 'Bird Demon' Raksha mask from Ambalangoda, the home of Sri Lankan mask craft. Made from light, durable Kaduru wood - a striking cultural wall piece.

products.name: Bamunu Traditional Wooden Mask
products.description: Traditional hand-carved Bamunu character mask, brightly painted in classic southern Sri Lankan style. A collectible piece of Ceylon folk art.

products.name: Brass Traditional Oil Lamp (Pahana)
products.description: Handcrafted solid brass ceremonial oil lamp used to bless Sri Lankan homes and occasions. Intricately detailed with a rooster finial - a timeless decorative heirloom.

products.name: Handwoven Rattan / Cane Basket
products.description: Eco-friendly basket handwoven from natural cane by rural Sri Lankan artisans. Sturdy and versatile for storage or decor.

products.name: Handmade Batik Wall Hanging
products.description: Vibrant hand-dyed batik textile art depicting Sri Lankan flora and fauna. Each piece is uniquely crafted using the traditional wax-resist dyeing technique.

products.name: Barefoot Classic Handloom Cotton Sarong
products.description: The iconic Barefoot handloom sarong - 'the jeans of Asia'. Woven from 100% cotton with designs inspired by Sri Lanka's flora, fauna and the Indian Ocean. Unisex and timeless.

products.name: Barefoot Designer Handloom Sarong
products.description: A premium designer edition of the beloved Barefoot handloom sarong, featuring bolder patterns and richer colour combinations. 100% cotton, handwoven in Sri Lanka.

products.name: Premium Sri Lankan Handmade Batik Sarong
products.description: 100% cotton batik sarong, hand-dyed with the traditional wax-resist method. Every piece carries a slightly unique print - perfect as beachwear or loungewear.

products.name: Handcrafted Batik Sarong - Lakshilpa
products.description: Colourful handmade batik sarong suitable for special occasions and everyday wear. Available in a variety of traditional Sri Lankan colour combinations.

products.name: Handloom Cotton Batik Shirt
products.description: Breathable handloom cotton shirt with a hand-painted batik motif. Lightweight and ideal for Sri Lanka's tropical climate - a smart-casual heritage piece.

items.name: Ahmad Ceylon Tea Premium Blend - Loose Leaf (200g)
items.description: A selection of premium teas from the best gardens of Sri Lanka. Smooth, aromatic loose-leaf black tea for a traditional pot of Ceylon tea.
